positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric mountain range silhouette against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. The mountains should be depicted using sharp, angular lines and interlocking planes, suggesting depth but maintaining clean cutouts for printing. The color palette should transition smoothly from deep indigo and cyan at the top to warm coral, tangerine, and gold near the horizon. Incorporate subtle, abstract floral patterns (like stylized mandalas or repeating archways) framing the base of the mountains, rendered in a complementary earth-toned negative space. Clean vectors, maximal contrast, perfect symmetry, high detail, suitable for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, noise, text, words, logo, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, ugly, low quality, extra limbs, disfigured, cartoonish, photorealistic
